visual_description:
A close-up shot focuses on a man in a dimly lit, green-hued environment. He is on the phone, holding it to his ear with his right hand while speaking with an intense, slightly agitated expression. He wears a light-colored jacket over a patterned shirt. In the background, other men stand around him, one of whom is a bald man in a dark shirt looking on. The camera remains steady, capturing the man's emotional state. White Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, and a watermark is visible in the top right corner. The audio features a tense phone conversation between a man and a woman. The man speaks first in a loud, agitated, and defensive tone, his voice filled with frustration as he exclaims, "胡说，我正帮他做事呀!" (Nonsense, I'm helping him with something!). His delivery is fast and forceful, suggesting he is trying to quickly dismiss an accusation.

The scene cuts to a woman in a different, warmer-lit indoor setting. She is on the phone, holding a white landline receiver to her ear. She wears a brown leather jacket and a watch. Her expression is serious and concerned as she listens and then speaks into the phone. The background is softly out
